parameters.query:
INSERT INTO "employers" (
  "vhsys_id", "matricula", "nome", "cargo", "cbo", "rg", "cpf",
  "data_nascimento", "salario", "data_adm", "data_dem", "status",
  "data_cad", "data_mod", "depto", "created_at", "updated_at"
) VALUES {{ range($json.transformed) }}
(
  {{ $item.vhsys_id }},
  {{ $item.matricula }},
  '{{ $item.nome }}',
  '{{ $item.cargo }}',
  '{{ $item.cbo }}',
  '{{ $item.rg }}',
  '{{ $item.cpf }}',
  {{ if $item.data_nascimento }}'{{ $item.data_nascimento }}'{{ else }}NULL{{ /if }},
  {{ $item.salario }},
  {{ if $item.data_adm }}'{{ $item.data_adm }}'{{ else }}NULL{{ /if }},
  {{ if $item.data_dem }}'{{ $item.data_dem }}'{{ else }}NULL{{ /if }},
  '{{ $item.status }}',
  {{ if $item.data_cad }}'{{ $item.data_cad }}'{{ else }}NULL{{ /if }},
  {{ if $item.data_mod }}'{{ $item.data_mod }}'{{ else }}NULL{{ /if }},
  '{{ $item.depto }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
){{ if $index < ($json.transformed.length - 1) }},{{ /if }}
{{ /range }}
ON CONFLICT ("vhsys_id")
DO UPDATE SET
  "matricula" = EXCLUDED."matricula",
  "nome" = EXCLUDED."nome",
  "cargo" = EXCLUDED."cargo",
  "cbo" = EXCLUDED."cbo",
  "rg" = EXCLUDED."rg",
  "cpf" = EXCLUDED."cpf",
  "data_nascimento" = EXCLUDED."data_nascimento",
  "salario" = EXCLUDED."salario",
  "data_adm" = EXCLUDED."data_adm",
  "data_dem" = EXCLUDED."data_dem",
  "status" = EXCLUDED."status",
  "data_cad" = EXCLUDED."data_cad",
  "data_mod" = EXCLUDED."data_mod",
  "depto" = EXCLUDED."depto",
  "updated_at" = NOW()
WHERE (
  "employers"."nome" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."nome" OR
  "employers"."cargo" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."cargo" OR
  "employers"."salario" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."salario" OR
  "employers"."status" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."status" OR
  "employers"."data_dem" IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED."data_dem"
);
